name: POLICY-BACKLOG-5
title: Add coding rule: avoid emojis in code/files unless explicitly requested
description: A recurring drift problem is LLMs adding emojis to source code, comments, and commit messages. coding-rules.md should add an explicit rule: 'Only use emojis if the user explicitly requests it. Avoid adding emojis to files unless asked.' (mirrors default Claude Code system prompt guidance). Suggested location: new bullet under coding-rules.md section 3 (Surgical Changes) or section 2 (Simplicity First).
